Rules.InvariantScript:
SortByColumns(
    AddColumns(
        Filter(
            EmergencyIncidents,
            Status.Value = "New" || Status.Value = "On the Way"
        ),
        StatusRank,
        If(
            Status.Value = "New",
            1,
            2
        ),
        TimeRank,
        Coalesce('Last Updated', 'Created Time')
    ),
    "StatusRank",
    SortOrder.Ascending,
    "TimeRank",
    SortOrder.Descending,
    "ID",
    SortOrder.Descending
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Sort(
    Filter(
        EmergencyIncidents,
        Status.Value <> "Done"
    ),
    'Created Time',
    SortOrder.Descending
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
"Updated: " & Text(
    Coalesce(ThisItem.'Last Updated', ThisItem.'Created Time'),
    "[$-en-US]h:mm AM/PM"
)
